The '''''Intrepid''''' was a [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]].

==History==
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the ''Intrepid'' served as [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura's]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] and spearheaded the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] assault at the [[Battle of Felucia (Outer Rim Sieges)/Legends|Battle of Felucia]].

{{Ship-stub}}
